app_release_notes: v0.16.7 - Import tab now has a visible 'Browse files...' link inside the drop zone so the click-to-pick option is impossible to miss (the whole drop zone is still clickable too). Starting a New Load clears the activity log and re-shows the fresh empty workbook's state, so stale 'Currently has 3 powder loads / 3 seating depth tests / suggested charge' lines from the previous load don't carry over.
